pi_items.source: NCBI GenBank CDS translation for MT-CYB (YP_003024038.1) is exactly 380 amino acids long, confirming 375 is a valid lower bound.
NCBI GenBank CDS translation for MT-CYB (YP_003024038.1) is exactly 380 amino acids long, confirming 385 is a valid upper bound.
NCBI GenBank annotation for NC_012920.1 CDS explicitly specifies '/transl_table=2' which corresponds to Vertebrate Mitochondrial.

pi_items.metadata_value: NCBI Reference Sequence: NC_012920.1 (Human mitochondrial genome, MT-CYB locus)
pi_items.verified_value: NCBI Reference Sequence: NC_012920.1 (Human mitochondrial genome, MT-CYB locus)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh directly downloads coordinates 14747-15887 from the NC_012920.1 locus via NCBI efetch.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes the real human mitochondrial Cytochrome B (MT-CYB) gene sequence (14747..15887) downloaded directly from NCBI NC_012920.1. Analysis of the NCBI GenBank annotation confirms that the correct translation table is 'Vertebrate Mitochondrial' (/transl_table=2), and applying this table correctly translates the sequence into a continuous protein of exactly 380 amino acids without internal stop codons.
